confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of all object transfers and placements. No visible drops or misplacements. Completion time well-documented through frame sequence.
technique_summary: Solid intermediate-level performance with all 6 objects successfully transferred in correct pattern. No penalties incurred. Total time of 97 seconds places performance in intermediate range.

All objects properly placed on pegs
improvement_suggestions: Focus on reducing overall time to reach expert range (40-60s)
